definition: a transparency is a piece of clear plastic that shows a photograph
example: Maura printed the photograph onto a transparency.

definition: a synonym is a word that means the same as another word
example: “Great” is a synonym for “good”.

definition: something that is unfamiliar is something that you do not know about
example: The man in the movie spoke an unfamiliar language.

definition: a subject is a topic or an area of knowledge that you learn about at school
example: History is Gael’s favorite subject.

definition: a slide is a small photograph that is printed onto clear plastic
example: Byron showed the slide on the wall behind him for the class to see.

definition: something that is necessary is needed in order to do something
example: Alek doesn’t have the necessary tools to fix his bike.

definition: if you reduce something, you make it smaller or less
example: Guillermo takes the bus daily to help reduce the number of cars on the road.

definition: if you memorize something, you learn it really well so you can remember it
example: Kara tries to memorize 10 new Spanish words every day.

definition: if you strengthen something, you make it stronger
example: The repairs to the bridge will strengthen it.

definition: the quality of something is how good or well made it is
example: The quality of the video was bad.

definition: evidence is something that you can see or hear that makes you believe something
example: The detective looked at every piece of evidence.

definition: an expert is someone who has a lot of knowledge about a topic
example: Sebastien is an expert in finance and business.

definition: an almond is a type of nut
example: Almonds are Aaminah’s favorite nut to eat.

definition: an ability is a skill have/has the ability
example: Xavier has an ability to talk for hours with everyone he meets.

definition: weight lifting is the sport of lifting heavy things
example: Jaehee started doing weight lifting at the gym.

definition: something that is recent happened not too long ago
example: The ground is still wet from the recent rain.

definition: a clue is a word or an item that helps you understand something
example: We followed the clue to find the hidden gold.

definition: a tip is a piece of useful advice
example: Axel asked his friends for the best tip about how to speak English fluently.

definition: if you decrease something, you make it smaller or make it less
example: Sales at the store have decreased by nearly 30 percent.

definition: a diet is the type of food that you eat regularly
example: Abel eats a healthy diet with lots of vegetables.

definition: something that is sugary is sweet and has a lot of sugar in it
example: Sugary foods like cake are some of Jessica’s favorite food.

definition: something that is essential is something that you need
example: It’s essential to book your tickets early for the show.

definition: a session is an amount of time given to an activity
example: The photo session at work took three hours.

definition: meditation is the act of being quiet and still to help your mind
example: Meditation helps Gianna to relax after a long day.

definition: if you influence something, you can cause it to change
example: Dara’s friends are trying to influence him to join the tennis team.

definition: if you meditate, you are quiet and still and try to clear your mind
example: I try to meditate for a few minutes every evening.

definition: the condition of something is how good or bad it is
example: Gizelle’s laptop is old, but it’s in very good condition.

definition: caving is the activity of moving through caves under the ground
example: Akeno loves to go caving with his brother.

definition: a campsite is an area where people can sleep outside
example: Santiago found a great campsite to stay at for the week.

definition: rock climbing is the activity of climbing the side of a mountain or rock with your hands, feet, and special equipment
example: The mountain had great places for Luciano to go rock climbing.

definition: if you raise money, you do things to collect money for a special or important purpose
example: The boy washed cars to raise money to help buy new books for the school.

definition: a bandage is a piece of cloth that you use to cover a part of your body that has been hurt
example: The nurse tied the bandage around Selina’s arm.

definition: childhood is the period of someone’s life when they are a child
example: Haider has many photos of his friends from his childhood.

definition: if something vibrates, it moves in a steady but fast back and forth movement
example: The floor started to vibrate when my music was too loud.

definition: if you realize something, you understand something you didn’t know before
example: Dario didn’t realize how much his grandmother enjoyed his visits.

definition: a technique is a way of doing something
example: The dancer has excellent technique in their movements.

definition: if you remind someone about something, you help them to remember it
example: Please remind Ichiro to bring my book back.

definition: if you color-code something, you give colors to different things to help you remember them
example: Harold likes to color-code his notes when studying.

definition: if you highlight something, you mark it in a different color so it stands out
example: Amaia used a marker to highlight useful words in class.

definition: if you stick something somewhere, you put it there and make it stay
example: Stick the posters on the wall.

definition: an archaeologist is a person who studies people from the past by looking at their buildings and other things from their time
example: Isaiah is studying history to become an archaeologist.

definition: a mind map is a drawing that links different facts to each other
example: Bruno draws mind maps to organize his ideas before writing an essay.

definition: a diagram is a simple drawing that shows how something works
example: The diagram helped Akeno to understand how the machine works.

definition: if you revise, you learn and remember the things you were taught before, so you can take a test or exam
example: Our French teacher told us to revise all the verbs we had learned.

definition: art is the activity of creating paintings and drawings
example: Roxy loves going to art class because she draws well.

definition: chemistry is a science that studies how the things around us are made and how they work
example: Sheldon teaches chemistry at high school.

definition: drama is the subject of acting and learning about other parts of theater
example: Karen is trying drama this term, but she’s not very good at it.

definition: geography is the study of countries and land, oceans, and weather
example: Kasem likes learning about the world in geography.

definition: IT is the study of computers and what they do
example: Kaede works in IT and can fix any problem on a computer.

definition: physics is the study of things like heat, light, electricity, and sound
example: She is a professor of physics at a university.

definition: a calculator is a machine that is used to help us do math
example: I can’t use my calculator in the math test today.

definition: someone who is forgetful often forgets things
example: Antonin becomes very forgetful when he is stressed.

definition: a facial expression is when your face shows what you are feeling
example: His facial expression showed that he was very serious.

definition: body language is when your body shows what you are feeling with different movements
example: I could tell from her body language that Olga was very happy.

definition: if you nod, you move your head up and down
example: Nod your head if you agree with me.

definition: if you do something actively, you mean to do it
example: Joaquin is actively involved in many sports clubs.

definition: something that is awful is very bad
example: Bettina felt awful after she forgot her friend’s birthday.

definition: ice skating is the activity of moving on ice in special boots
example: Ice skating was a lot of fun and easy to learn.

definition: something that is memorable is easy to remember
example: The concert was so memorable that Liz would never forget it.

definition: a comedian is a person whose job is to make people laugh
example: The audience laughed loudly at the comedian’s jokes.

definition: the atmosphere of a place is the general feeling you get when you are there
example: The atmosphere in Phuket is so relaxing.

definition: if you rent something, you pay money to use it for a certain amount of time
example: Liz will rent a car to drive when she goes to Greece on vacation.

definition: a balcony is the floor outside a building, on a level above the ground, with a low wall around it
example: From the balcony, we could see the ocean and the mountains.
